TITLE: The Name of the Wind
DESCR: A legendary wizard recounts his life story to a chronicler over three days.
AUTHOR: Patrick Rothfuss

TITLE: Dune
DESCR: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for the desert planet Arrakis and its precious spice.
AUTHOR: Frank Herbert

DESCR: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society ruled by the omnipresent Big Brother.
AUTHOR: George Orwell

TITLE: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
DESCR: An ordinary man is whisked off Earth moments before its destruction to travel the galaxy.
AUTHOR: Douglas Adams

TITLE: Pride and Prejudice
DESCR: The romantic clash between the headstrong Elizabeth Bennet and the proud Mr. Darcy.
AUTHOR: Jane Austen

TITLE: The Hobbit
DESCR: A homebody hobbit is swept into an epic quest to reclaim a dwarf kingdom from a dragon.
AUTHOR: J.R.R. Tolkien

TITLE: Crime and Punishment
DESCR: A destitute student commits a murder and is haunted by guilt and paranoia in Tsarist Russia.
AUTHOR: Fyodor Dostoevsky

TITLE: Neuromancer
DESCR: A washed-up hacker is hired for one last job that draws him into a world of artificial intelligence.
AUTHOR: William Gibson

TITLE: The Alchemist
DESCR: A young shepherd travels from Spain to Egypt in search of treasure and his personal legend.
AUTHOR: Paulo Coelho

TITLE: Brave New World
DESCR: A future society built on pleasure and stability confronts the limits of its engineered happiness.
AUTHOR: Aldous Huxley
